subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: One night in Mazandaran, when Mulla Husayn saw Quddus and heard his utterances of wisdom and knowledge, he arose at once
subcodes.first_line_orig: در مازندران شب حضرت باب الباب چون حضرت قدوس را دید و بیانات فضل و حکمت از لسان ایشان
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
